hero.line2: > Looking for a SOC / Security Analyst apprenticeship — September 2026

bastion.name: Bastion
bastion.description: Discord security bot in Go — SaaS with web dashboard, risk engine, alt-account detection, ticket system

orbis.name: Orbis
orbis.description: Unix shell written in Rust — Cargo workspace with ~40 utilities, hand-rolled AST, job control, REPL with autocompletion

dropin.name: Drop'In
dropin.description: Civic-tech mobile app for waste management — collaborative map, AI scanner, B2B dashboard for local authorities

terminal.no_readme_here: enter a project first (e.g. cd bastion)
terminal.readme_bastion:
# Bastion

Discord security bot in Go — SaaS with web dashboard,
risk engine, alt-account detection, ticket system.

Stack   :  Go · PostgreSQL · Docker · Discord API · OAuth2
Status  :  In progress
GitHub  :  https://github.com/Jonathan-p-z/Bastion
terminal.readme_orbis:
# Orbis

Unix shell written in Rust — Cargo workspace with ~40 utilities,
hand-rolled AST, job control, REPL with autocompletion.

Stack   :  Rust · Cargo
Status  :  In progress
GitHub  :  https://github.com/Jonathan-p-z/Orbis
terminal.readme_dropin:
# Drop'In

Civic-tech mobile app for waste management —
collaborative map, AI scanner, B2B dashboard for local authorities.

Stack   :  Flutter · Rust · Axum · PostGIS
Status  :  In progress
GitHub  :  https://github.com/Jonathan-p-z/Drop-In
terminal.readme_keyvault:
# KeyVault

Encrypted password manager written in Python —
AES-GCM, Argon2id, automatic format migration,
GUI + CLI, anti-strings, mirror backup.

Stack   :  Python · Argon2id · AES-GCM · PyInstaller
Status  :  Completed
GitHub  :  https://github.com/Jonathan-p-z/keyvault
terminal.readme_valorant:
# Valorant Tracker

Valorant tracker in Go — agents, weapons, maps via
the official API, search & filters, favorites system.

Stack   :  Go · HTML · CSS · JavaScript
Status  :  Completed
GitHub  :  https://github.com/Jonathan-p-z/api_valorant

about.title: $ whoami
about.body: Cybersecurity Bachelor student at Ynov Campus Aix-en-Provence, specializing in SOC analysis and defensive security, with a strong offensive background through CTF competitions and pentesting. I maintain a Proxmox homelab with self-hosted services, and build open-source projects in Go and Rust to sharpen my technical skills. Looking for a SOC / Security Analyst apprenticeship starting September 2026 in the Aix-Marseille-Provence area.
